products.name: Valentine Heart Cake

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: I ordered a custom birthday cake for my daughter's 5th birthday and Arpita ji created something absolutely magical! The unicorn cake was so beautiful that everyone was taking photos before cutting it. The taste was divine — moist, fresh, and not overly sweet. Will definitely order again!

testimonials.name: Rahul & Sneha Patil
testimonials.text: We ordered our anniversary cake from Prince Home Made Cakes and it exceeded all expectations. The rose gold two-tier cake was absolutely stunning. Every guest at the party complimented the taste and design. Arpita ji is truly talented and dedicated to her craft.

testimonials.name: Meera Nair
testimonials.text: The Belgian dark truffles are hands down the best homemade chocolates I have ever tasted! I ordered the festive hamper for Diwali and every single piece was perfect. Rich, smooth, and made with such care. Already planning to order for Christmas!

testimonials.name: Vikram Desai
testimonials.text: Ordered a photo cake for my mother's 60th birthday. The quality of the print and the freshness of the cake was outstanding. My mother was moved to tears seeing her favourite photo on such a beautifully crafted cake. Thank you Arpita ji for the wonderful memories!

testimonials.name: Anita Kulkarni
testimonials.text: I have been ordering chocolates from Prince Home Made Cakes for over a year now and the consistency is remarkable. Each box is a delight. The bonbons with hazelnut filling are my absolute favourite. Great packaging, prompt delivery, and always fresh!

testimonials.name: Sanjay Joshi
testimonials.text: Got a custom 3D sculpted cake for my son's superhero themed party. The attention to detail was incredible — I could not believe it was homemade! Arpita ji truly has a gift. Price was very reasonable for the quality. 100% recommend to everyone.

faqs.question: Do you take custom cake orders?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Custom cakes are our speciality. You can share your ideas, themes, colours, and preferences with us, and we will bring your dream cake to life. We accept orders for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, corporate events, and any special occasion. Just contact us to discuss your vision!

faqs.question: How many days in advance should I place my order?
faqs.answer: We recommend placing orders at least 3–5 days in advance for standard cakes and 5–7 days for custom or sculpted cakes. For large orders or festival seasons, booking 10+ days ahead is advisable to ensure perfect preparation and timely delivery.

faqs.question: Do you provide home delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer home delivery within our service area. Delivery charges may apply depending on distance. We also offer pick-up from our home kitchen at a pre-arranged time. Please contact us to confirm delivery availability for your location.

faqs.question: Are eggless options available?
faqs.answer: Yes! All our cakes are available in eggless variants without compromising on taste or quality. Our eggless recipes have been perfected over years and are absolutely delicious. Please mention your preference while placing the order.

faqs.question: Can chocolates be gifted in custom boxes?
faqs.answer: Definitely! We offer beautiful customised chocolate gift boxes with personalised messages, ribbons, and wrapping. These make perfect gifts for birthdays, Diwali, Rakhi, Valentine's Day, corporate gifting, and more. Just let us know your requirements!

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major payment methods including UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), bank transfer, and cash on delivery/pick-up. Payment details will be shared at the time of order confirmation.

faqs.question: Do you cater to bulk or event orders?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are happy to take bulk orders for weddings, corporate events, baby showers, kitty parties, and any large gatherings. Special discounts are available for bulk orders. Contact us early so we can plan and prepare accordingly.

faqs.question: How are the products packaged?
faqs.answer: All our products are carefully packaged in food-grade, hygienic packaging. Cakes are packed in sturdy boxes to maintain their shape. Chocolates come in elegant gift-ready packaging. We ensure every item reaches you in perfect condition.
